exit_load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 year.
benchmark: Nifty India Defence Total Return Index
about_fund:
About HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Priya Ranjan is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹28.71.
The HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100.  Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 year.
